title: achillea millefolium var. alpicola
intro: Achillea millefolium var. alpicola, also known as Alpine Yarrow, is a variety of the Yarrow plant, a flowering perennial native to mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Alpine Yarrow include reducing menstrual cramps, improving digestion, and acting as an antihistamine to alleviate allergic reactions. Alpine Yarrow can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
